items.name: Maiko's kimono -Halloween- No.2
items.description:
The "Kimono" is one of Japan's traditional costumes.
There are many different types of kimono and this item was designed with a Halloween pattern based on the motif of a "Susohiki"!

Maiko usually wear shoes called "oboko" and walk slowly.
Let's all walk slowly like maiko!

In order to improve the quality, this kimono was made as a top and bottom set!
The top is available in our store, so please have a look there too!

Japan, Japanese, Kimono, Kyoto, Nara, Maiko,
